voice_observations.caption_text:
Behind every role, there’s a mum making it work. Showing up. Delivering. Every single day. 💛

Amal Ghofaily — Leasing Manager, Administration/noon Core, KSA
“One thing I’m proud of, balancing being a mum and working in tech, is showing my children that mums can build careers, follow their passions, and still be there for their family.”

Aya Jabri — Senior Lead, Account Management, Commercial/noon Food, UAE
“My kid thinks I spend my day ordering food. In reality, at noon Food I help big brands grow and reach millions of customers,  all while trying to make it home in time for bedtime stories.”

Merihane Abdel Aziz — Head of Marketplace Ops, Marketplace/Namshi, Egypt
“My kids think I spend my days shopping 😄 In reality, I make sure everything runs smoothly so everyone else can.”

Athiba Alkaabi — CSR Executive, PR & Comms/noon Core, UAE
“One thing I’m proud of balancing as a mum in tech is driving initiatives that give back to the community, while still being present for my family.”

Menna Mohamed Elsayed — Assistant Manager, Training & Onboarding, Support/noon Core, Egypt
“To other mums thinking about working in tech, take it easy. You already have the multitasking, the prioritisation, the resilience. What people don’t see is that you can run meetings, manage partners, and prep your toddler for the bus - all at once. It may look seamless, but the engine is always running.”

Muna Mainali — Junior Program Manager, Fugistics operations/noon Core, UAE
“I’m proud to show my kids that being a mum doesn’t limit your dreams, it gives you more reason to chase them. My kids are my power.”

#mothersday
voice_observations.hook_text: Behind every role, there’s a mum making it work.
